hassio_confirm.title: Signalbot
hassio_confirm.description: The Signalbot add-on has been discovered. Confirm to set up the Signalbot integration. Signal account linking and recipients are managed through the add-on UI.

user.title: Signalbot
user.description: Enter the URL of the Signalbot add-on manager. You can find the manager in the add-on sidebar.

data_description.manager_url: URL of the Signalbot add-on manager, for example http://local-signalbot:8099.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Signalbot add-on manager. Check the URL and make sure the add-on is running.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Signalbot is allowed.

send_message.name: Send message
send_message.description: Sends a Signal message to one or more recipients via signal-cli-rest-api.

message.name: Message
message.description: The text body of the message to send.

recipients.name: Recipients
recipients.description: List of recipients. Each entry may be a configured chat-partner name (case-insensitive), an E.164 phone number (e.g. +49151…), a Signal username with the 'u:' prefix (e.g. u:alice.1234), or a group ID with the 'group.' prefix (e.g. group.ckRzaEd4…).

attachments.name: Attachments
attachments.description: Optional list of base64-encoded file contents to attach to the message.
